steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures surrounding the blank
steps.content: The blank appears between a singular noun phrase functioning as the subject (“One species, the silverleaf sunflower”) and a noun phrase functioning as the direct object.

steps.title: Apply the finite verb rule
steps.content: An independent clause requires a finite verb as its main predicate. “Includes” is the only choice providing a finite verb form that matches the singular subject. The other choices are non-finite forms—past participle, present participle, and infinitive—that cannot function as the main verb. That matches choice D — D is correct.
